a lot of mods add new atoms, but not all of them, and usually even the new atoms come with new glyphs that interact with them. for example, the vacancy mod adds an "empty metal" that can be created and destroyed with the glyph of hollowing, and other glyphs can be empowered to drain lead to vaca with the glyph of extraction. all these mechanics just for one new element
There's no rusting of iron, though there is a mod that adds uranium which decays to lead
